expected_pass.description: A draft spec with an unresolved CQ-promoted ND decision is a valid Gate B stopped state.
A review with blocking issues is schema-valid before Gate D pass is required.
An intake.md that marks answered decisions as answered is accepted by the intake cross-check.
An approved spec with only prohibition constraints such as No external database does not require WEB evidence.
An approved spec may structure Gate B reference reconnaissance when candidates point to existing evidence.

expected_failure.description: An approved Gate B artifact root must include approval audit metadata in spec.json.
expected_failure.expected_message: spec.approval_audit is required when spec.approval is approved

expected_failure.description: An unresolved promoted CQ decision must remain in open_decisions until resolved.
expected_failure.expected_message: promoted decision ND-4 must be in open_decisions until it has a resolution

expected_failure.description: Task graph validation with --require-approved-spec must reject the draft spec.
expected_failure.expected_message: task graph generation is blocked until spec.approval is approved

expected_failure.description: Gate D pass validation must reject reviews with blocking issues.
expected_failure.expected_message: review cannot pass Gate D while blocking_issues is non-empty

expected_failure.description: An intake.md that still marks an answered decision open is rejected.
expected_failure.expected_message: ND-1 is answered in intake.json but intake.md still marks it open

expected_failure.description: A status.md without the required Progress line is rejected.
An approved spec that selects PostgreSQL in architecture/dependencies still requires WEB evidence.
expected_failure.expected_message: approved spec with material technology choices requires WEB-n evidence

expected_failure.description: A reference reconnaissance candidate must point to an evidence source_id present in the same spec.
expected_failure.expected_message: spec.reference_reconnaissance REF-1 references unknown evidence source_id WEB-2
